examples: During these periods, excessive pressure can be exerted on the peroneus tertius tendon.
I Tertius, who wrote this epistle, salute you in the Lord.
Rom. 16:22 I, Tertius, who write this epistle, greet you in the Lord.
After a great break by Denis Hickie, captain Brian O'Driscoll chipped ahead and out-paced Tertius Losper to score, with Ronan O'Gara converting.
The final word went to Namibia as centre Bradley Langenhoven grabbed an interception try, which was converted by Tertius Losper, in the last minute.
